query: I was thinking of getting some work done in the office how is the air quality in there right now

steps.thought: The user wants to know the air quality in the office. I need to first find the room ID for the office, then get its environmental states to check the air quality (PM10).
I found the office room ID. Now I need to get the environmental states of the office to check the air quality (PM10).
I have retrieved the environmental states for the office. The PM10 level, which indicates air quality, is approximately 54.4 μg/m³. I can now provide this information to the user.

action_input.answer: The air quality in the office is currently good, with a PM10 level of approximately 54.4 μg/m³.
